fields.description: Must match a tier_name in the parent's Tiers table.
fields.label: Tier Name

fields.description: Functional role within the configurator (e.g. STRUCTURE, DOOR, ADDON, OUTPUT). Use OUTPUT for the final configured product price.
fields.label: Role / Component

fields.description: e.g. HINGED, SLIDING, OPEN (Night Collection)
fields.label: Mode

fields.description: Wardrobe model option, sofa model key, etc.
fields.label: Option Code

fields.description: For sofas — number of seats
fields.label: Seat Count

fields.description: Spare dimension key for future configurators
fields.label: Extra Key 1

fields.description: Spare dimension key for future configurators
fields.label: Extra Key 2

fields.description: Define named tiers with minimum quotation value thresholds. The system picks the highest tier the quote qualifies for. Always include a base tier with min_order_value = 0.
fields.label: Price Tiers

fields.description: One row per combination of tier + dimensions. Use role_name='OUTPUT' for the final configured product price (what goes on the sales document). Other roles are component-level costs for internal reference.
fields.label: Pricing Matrix

fields.description: Human-readable name, e.g. 'Standard', '3-Piece Set', 'Full Suite'
fields.label: Tier Name

fields.description: Total configured value on the quotation must reach this threshold to activate this tier. Set 0 for the base tier.
fields.label: Min Order Value (inc VAT)

fields.description: When this custom line is later registered as a permanent stock SKU, link it here. The CFG- reference is kept for backwards tracing.
fields.label: Graduated Stock Item

fields.description: Frozen snapshot of the configurator choice state. Null for FREETEXT lines.
fields.label: Configuration JSON

fields.description: Frozen snapshot of the component price breakdown at the time of approval.
fields.label: Pricing JSON

fields.description: Short uppercase code, e.g. AXIS, MARESCO_NIGHT, SOFA
fields.label: Code

fields.description: When checked the formula can use ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM steps. The UI will ask for an LM dimension when previewing.
fields.label: Requires Linear Metre (LM)

fields.description: Maximum % discount sales staff may offer. The floor price = RRP Inc. VAT × (1 - this%). Offers below the floor trigger a warning.
fields.label: Max Discount % (floor for sales)

fields.description: Extra fixed cost added to the weighted distribution total when Gozo delivery is selected in the Night Collection configurator.
fields.label: Gozo Delivery Surcharge (€)

fields.description: Steps are applied sequentially to the base cost price to arrive at the selling price.
fields.label: Formula Steps

fields.description: DISCOUNT_PCT: multiply by (1 - value/100). INCREASE_PCT: multiply by (1 + value/100). ADD_FIXED: add value €. ADD_FIXED_WEIGHTED: distribute value € across BOM pieces by cm_weight_factor. ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM: add (value × LM) + value2. MULTIPLY: multiply running total by value.
fields.label: Step Type
fields.options:
DISCOUNT_PCT
INCREASE_PCT
ADD_FIXED
ADD_FIXED_WEIGHTED
ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM
MULTIPLY

fields.description: Percentage (for PCT types), fixed €amount (for ADD_FIXED), €/LM rate (for ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM), or multiplier (for MULTIPLY).
fields.label: Value

fields.description: For ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM only: fixed € added regardless of LM. Total = (value × LM) + value2.
fields.label: Value 2
